_comment: Recorded Strapi v5 REST response shape for PRD-205-R28 (standard-tier) integration. Two articles entities (v5 flat envelope), one with a markdown body and a relation to a sibling article. Markdown body is emitted as a single `markdown` block (PRD-205-R9 default).

articles.title: Installing Acme
articles.summary: How to install the Acme SDK and get started.
articles.body:
# Installing Acme

First, install the SDK:

```bash
npm install @acme/sdk
```

> [!info] Node 18+ is required.

Next, configure your environment.
